subcodes.first_line: O thou bewildered and passionate one! The time of liberation and rapture, nay rather, of preparation and exposure, hath come. How long wilt thou remain bewildered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرگشته سودائی وقت آزادگی و شیداای بلکه آمادگی و رسواایست تا چند سرگشته و
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
